type.name: type_geo_site
type.wiki: +section title={{name}} :navtop +row +col-8 {{description wikify="true"}} :heading Data {{tabletree message="No data available" orderby=name ascending=true showType=false showSize=false}} -col +col-4 +center {{image inherited="false" showCaption=true multiples="true" popup=true message="" width="80%" useThumbnail="true" }} :vspace 1em {{mapentry hideIfNoLocations=true width="100%" height="200px"}} :vspace 1em {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="content.license" includeTitle=false}} -center -col -row +if property=show_type_summary ---- :vspace 1em :heading Data Type Summary +center {{typecount addPageSearch=true doColor=false message="No data available" ancestor="${this}" addAncestorToSearchLink=true addSearchLink=true}} -center -if +if property=show_search ---- :vspace 1em :heading Search Site{{display_entrylist startWithAny=true startWithAny=true addAnyType=true addAllTypes=true showEntryType=true showAncestor=true ancestor=this metadataTypes="" entryTypes="super:type_core_base,type_data_file,type_geo_site,super:type_document,group,type_map_folder,type_display_children" orderByTypes="name,relevant,createdate,date,size" displayTypes="list,images,map,display" includeNonImages=false }} -if ---- :heading Information {{information details=true}} -section
